# Node Agent Module

<!-- Generated by tools/generate-python-reference-pages.py -->

The node agent lives on each Kubernetes node, watches managed pods, applies MAC and IPv6 state inside pod network namespaces, and turns allocator bulk requests into per-pod batched netlink operations.

## Source Module

- Source file: [`CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-node-agent/agent.py`](https://github.com/cmxsafe/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6/blob/main/CMXsafeMAC-IPv6-node-agent/agent.py)
- Mirrored module for MkDocs: `docs_api.node_agent`

- [explicit-ipv6-parallelism.md](../../explicit-ipv6-parallelism.md)

## Mental Model By Concern

These groups are ordered to make the module easier to learn from left to right: input and helpers first, state and batching next, then the outer HTTP or runtime surface.
